text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Satsuki Sho. Now that
Mihono Bourbon has overcome her stamina
hurdles, expectations for her are high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race, Rice Shower extends a shaky
hand toward the runner she so admires. Mihono
Bourbon doesn't understand the gesture's
meaning, but shakes her hand out of politeness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Round one of the Classic Triple Crown, the
Satsuki Sho, begins now!
